song.title: Holiness
song.author: Scott Underwood
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .E A Holiness, . B A Holiness is what I long for. .E A B Holiness is what I need. .E A Holiness, . B A E A B Holiness is what You want from me.
[C] . E A B A Take my heart and form it. . E A B A Take my mind, transform it. . E A B A Take my will, conform it . E A B A To Yours, to Yours, oh Lord.
[V2] Faithfulness, Faithfulness is what I long for. Faithfulness is what I need. Faithfulness, Faithfulness is what You want from me.
[V3] Righteousness, Righteousness is what I long for. Righteousness is what I need. Righteousness, Righteousness is what You want from me.
